description.zh: 從價值排序、金錢與安全感，到家庭、生活方向、承諾與社交邊界，在生活選擇裡看見彼此靈魂共振。
description.en: From value priorities, money and security, to family, life direction, commitment, and social boundaries—see your souls resonate in the choices of everyday life.

endMessage.zh: 謝謝你們把重要的選擇攤開來聊。想法不一樣的地方，也可以先放著，改天再談。
endMessage.en: Thank you for laying the choices that matter on the table. Where you differ, it's okay to set it down for now and come back another day.

text.zh: 如果要你排出目前人生最重要的三件事，會是哪三件？想聽聽每一件對你的意義。
text.en: If you ranked the three things that matter most in your life right now, what would they be? I'd love to hear what each one means to you.
text.th: If you ranked the three things that matter most in your life right now, what would they be? I'd love to hear what each one means to you.
text.ja: If you ranked the three things that matter most in your life right now, what would they be? I'd love to hear what each one means to you.

text.zh: 有沒有一個你一直很珍惜的原則或習慣，想讓我更了解它對你的意義？
text.en: Is there a principle or habit you've always treasured that you'd like me to understand more deeply?
text.th: Is there a principle or habit you've always treasured that you'd like me to understand more deeply?
text.ja: Is there a principle or habit you've always treasured that you'd like me to understand more deeply?

text.zh: 當工作、家人和我們的關係同時需要你，你通常怎麼取捨？你希望我怎麼陪你？
text.en: When work, family, and our relationship all need you at once, how do you usually weigh them? And how would you like me to be there for you?
text.th: When work, family, and our relationship all need you at once, how do you usually weigh them? And how would you like me to be there for you?
text.ja: When work, family, and our relationship all need you at once, how do you usually weigh them? And how would you like me to be there for you?

text.zh: 有沒有哪個價值對你來說幾乎不能退讓？如果我們剛好在這裡不一樣，你希望我們怎麼與這份差異相處？
text.en: Is there a value you can hardly compromise on? If we happen to differ there, how would you like us to live with that difference?
text.th: Is there a value you can hardly compromise on? If we happen to differ there, how would you like us to live with that difference?
text.ja: Is there a value you can hardly compromise on? If we happen to differ there, how would you like us to live with that difference?

text.zh: 花錢的時候，什麼樣的消費會讓你覺得「真值得」？什麼又會讓你心疼？
text.en: When it comes to spending, what feels truly worth it to you—and what makes you wince a little?
text.th: When it comes to spending, what feels truly worth it to you—and what makes you wince a little?
text.ja: When it comes to spending, what feels truly worth it to you—and what makes you wince a little?

text.zh: 對你來說，存到什麼程度、或過著什麼樣的生活，才算真正的「安全感」？
text.en: For you, what amount of savings—or what kind of life—would feel like real security?
text.th: For you, what amount of savings—or what kind of life—would feel like real security?
text.ja: For you, what amount of savings—or what kind of life—would feel like real security?

text.zh: 如果我們的收入或花錢習慣差很多，你希望我們怎麼安排金錢，兩個人都能自在？
text.en: If our incomes or spending habits turn out quite different, how could we arrange money so both of us feel at ease?
text.th: If our incomes or spending habits turn out quite different, how could we arrange money so both of us feel at ease?
text.ja: If our incomes or spending habits turn out quite different, how could we arrange money so both of us feel at ease?

text.zh: 你對「一起管錢」的想像是什麼？各管各的、部分共用，還是全部一起？可以先聊聊看，不用今天決定。
text.en: How do you picture handling money together—keeping it separate, partly shared, or fully combined? We can simply explore it; nothing needs deciding today.
text.th: How do you picture handling money together—keeping it separate, partly shared, or fully combined? We can simply explore it; nothing needs deciding today.
text.ja: How do you picture handling money together—keeping it separate, partly shared, or fully combined? We can simply explore it; nothing needs deciding today.

text.zh: 你長大的家裡，有哪個相處方式是你想帶進我們的關係？有哪個是你想留在門外的？
text.en: From the family you grew up in, what's one way of relating you'd like to bring into us—and one you'd rather leave at the door?
text.th: From the family you grew up in, what's one way of relating you'd like to bring into us—and one you'd rather leave at the door?
text.ja: From the family you grew up in, what's one way of relating you'd like to bring into us—and one you'd rather leave at the door?

text.zh: 逢年過節要去誰家、待多久，你心裡最理想的安排是什麼樣子？
text.en: For holidays—whose family to visit and how long to stay—what arrangement feels most right in your heart?
text.th: For holidays—whose family to visit and how long to stay—what arrangement feels most right in your heart?
text.ja: For holidays—whose family to visit and how long to stay—what arrangement feels most right in your heart?

text.zh: 當家人對我們的生活有意見時，你希望我們站在哪裡？怎麼一起回應會讓你安心？
text.en: When family members weigh in on our life, where would you like the two of us to stand—and how could we respond together in a way that reassures you?
text.th: When family members weigh in on our life, where would you like the two of us to stand—and how could we respond together in a way that reassures you?
text.ja: When family members weigh in on our life, where would you like the two of us to stand—and how could we respond together in a way that reassures you?

text.zh: 關於要不要小孩、什麼時候、想怎麼陪伴孩子長大，你現在最真實的想法是什麼？還沒有答案也完全可以。
text.en: About having kids—whether, when, and how you'd want to raise them—what are your most honest thoughts right now? It's completely okay not to have an answer yet.
text.th: About having kids—whether, when, and how you'd want to raise them—what are your most honest thoughts right now? It's completely okay not to have an answer yet.
text.ja: About having kids—whether, when, and how you'd want to raise them—what are your most honest thoughts right now? It's completely okay not to have an answer yet.

text.zh: 如果可以自由選擇，你最想住在什麼樣的地方、過什麼樣的日常？
text.en: If you could choose freely, where would you most want to live, and what would your everyday look like?
text.th: If you could choose freely, where would you most want to live, and what would your everyday look like?
text.ja: If you could choose freely, where would you most want to live, and what would your everyday look like?

text.zh: 最近有沒有什麼新的興趣或夢想，正在你心裡慢慢發芽？想聽你說說。
text.en: Has a new interest or dream been quietly taking root in you lately? I'd love to hear about it.
text.th: Has a new interest or dream been quietly taking root in you lately? I'd love to hear about it.
text.ja: Has a new interest or dream been quietly taking root in you lately? I'd love to hear about it.

text.zh: 想像五年後的我們，你看見什麼樣的畫面？哪一部分最讓你期待？
text.en: When you picture us five years from now, what do you see? Which part excites you the most?
text.th: When you picture us five years from now, what do you see? Which part excites you the most?
text.ja: When you picture us five years from now, what do you see? Which part excites you the most?

text.zh: 如果有一天我們對生活方向想得不一樣——像是搬家、轉職、出國——你希望我們怎麼一起做決定？
text.en: If one day we see our life direction differently—moving, changing careers, going abroad—how would you like us to make that decision together?
text.th: If one day we see our life direction differently—moving, changing careers, going abroad—how would you like us to make that decision together?
text.ja: If one day we see our life direction differently—moving, changing careers, going abroad—how would you like us to make that decision together?

text.zh: 對你來說，「承諾」在日常裡長什麼樣子？哪些小事會讓你感覺到自己被好好承諾著？
text.en: What does commitment look like in everyday life for you? Which small things make you feel genuinely committed to?
text.th: What does commitment look like in everyday life for you? Which small things make you feel genuinely committed to?
text.ja: What does commitment look like in everyday life for you? Which small things make you feel genuinely committed to?

text.zh: 關於婚姻或長期關係的樣子，你心裡有什麼想像或猶豫？都可以慢慢說。
text.en: About marriage, or the shape of a long-term relationship, what hopes or hesitations live in you? Take all the time you need.
text.th: About marriage, or the shape of a long-term relationship, what hopes or hesitations live in you? Take all the time you need.
text.ja: About marriage, or the shape of a long-term relationship, what hopes or hesitations live in you? Take all the time you need.

text.zh: 你希望我們多久聊一次「我們接下來要去哪」？用什麼方式聊，你會最放鬆？
text.en: How often would you like us to talk about where we're heading next—and in what setting would that feel most relaxed for you?
text.th: How often would you like us to talk about where we're heading next—and in what setting would that feel most relaxed for you?
text.ja: How often would you like us to talk about where we're heading next—and in what setting would that feel most relaxed for you?

text.zh: 如果未來某一天，我們其中一個人想放慢腳步或改變原本的計劃，你希望另一個人怎麼接住他？
text.en: If someday one of us wants to slow down or change the plan we made, how would you like the other to catch and hold that?
text.th: If someday one of us wants to slow down or change the plan we made, how would you like the other to catch and hold that?
text.ja: If someday one of us wants to slow down or change the plan we made, how would you like the other to catch and hold that?

text.zh: 和朋友相處的時間跟只有我們兩個人的時光，你理想中的比例大概是多少？
text.en: Between time with friends and time that's just ours, what balance feels ideal to you?
text.th: Between time with friends and time that's just ours, what balance feels ideal to you?
text.ja: Between time with friends and time that's just ours, what balance feels ideal to you?

text.zh: 有沒有哪種社交場合，你特別希望我在你身邊？或者反而想自己去就好？
text.en: Are there social situations where you especially want me by your side—or ones you'd honestly rather go to on your own?
text.th: Are there social situations where you especially want me by your side—or ones you'd honestly rather go to on your own?
text.ja: Are there social situations where you especially want me by your side—or ones you'd honestly rather go to on your own?

text.zh: 關於和朋友之間的界線——尤其可能被誤會的那種——你自在的範圍在哪裡？我們可以慢慢對齊，不用一次講完。
text.en: About boundaries with friends—especially the kind that could be misread—where does your comfort zone sit? We can align bit by bit; it doesn't have to be settled in one talk.
text.th: About boundaries with friends—especially the kind that could be misread—where does your comfort zone sit? We can align bit by bit; it doesn't have to be settled in one talk.
text.ja: About boundaries with friends—especially the kind that could be misread—where does your comfort zone sit? We can align bit by bit; it doesn't have to be settled in one talk.

text.zh: 在社群上公開我們的關係到什麼程度，對你來說是剛剛好的？
text.en: How much of our relationship feels just right to share on social media, for you?
text.th: How much of our relationship feels just right to share on social media, for you?
text.ja: How much of our relationship feels just right to share on social media, for you?

text.zh: 當你需要獨處或自己的空間時，想用什麼方式讓我知道？我可以怎麼回應，讓你完全不需要感到抱歉？
text.en: When you need solitude or space of your own, how would you like to let me know—and how can I respond so you never feel sorry for asking?
text.th: When you need solitude or space of your own, how would you like to let me know—and how can I respond so you never feel sorry for asking?
text.ja: When you need solitude or space of your own, how would you like to let me know—and how can I respond so you never feel sorry for asking?
